name: @tootallnate/ffmpeg-bink-video-wasm
description: Bink 1 video decoder extension for @tootallnate/ffmpeg-wasm. Pair with @tootallnate/ffmpeg-bink-demuxer-wasm.

scripts.build: if [ -x /tmp/wasi-sdk/bin/clang ]; then make; fi && mkdir -p dist && cp src/bink-video.so dist/bink-video.so

author: Nathan Rajlich <n@n8.io>
